Bootstrapped by Consensys

Dapps are changing the world

On Linea, dapps find everything they need to build, grow, and succeed.

From making up the new decentralized financial system, to revolutionizing gaming, democratizing social media, and so much more—Dapps are the next evolution of the internet. They will change how everyone approaches digital experiences.  

Linea is the secure zkEVM ecosystem that empowers dapps to thrive.

Start Building Apply for Funding

MetaMask Integration

Dapps connect to MetaMask’s 100 million native web3 users in ways no other network can deliver

Ecosystem Engagement

Dapps gain visibility and activity through participation in the Linea Voyage, a series of activations designed to prepare the network for decentralization

Extensive Partner Support

Developers receive exceptional support and warm connections to other projects for opportunities to partner and boost growth

Enhanced Distribution

Dapps expand audience reach with Linea’s vast network

Developer ready

Dapps build seamlessly with Linea’s 100% EVM bytecode compatibility  while leveraging rapid transactions and low gas fees

Soon, the safest way to interact with web3

Linea delivers unrivaled network security with its cryptographically secure zk infrastructure, comprehensive security partnerships, and security-oriented ecosystem culture.

ZK Technology: Linea leverages quantum-resistant lattice-based cryptography alongside a recursion-friendly zkSNARK prover, formal verification, and diverse clients to maximize infrastructure security.

Security Partnerships: Linea works with over 20 security partners on threat prevention, real-time monitoring, post-incident tracing, user protection, and trust and reputation systems—once these systems are complete, Linea will be the safest chain from which to interact with web3.

Security Culture: We encourage community transparency around threats and vulnerabilities, and encourage our dapp partners to uphold the highest security standards.

Learn More About Security on Linea

POWERED BY CONSENSYS

Home to the most secure, exciting, and innovative web3 projects

Linea’s mission is to make the decentralized internet safe and accessible for everyone. To this end, we’ve established the most robust security system in web3, and we host ecosystem activations that encourage web3 education, exploration, and expertise. 

Join the linea voyage Explore the ecosystem view dapp dashboard

Committed to Ethereum,
and bootstrapped by Consensys

Linea is committed to decentralization while being bootstrapped by Consensys, one of the strongest forces behind Ethereum’s development.
